code_reuse.rationale: Shared functions used by both update-summary variants. regenerate_summary still uses inline awk — missed reuse.

pattern_fidelity.rationale: update_worktree_summary mirrors update_summary structure. regenerate_worktree_summary omits post-write validation loop.

atomicity.rationale: Temp + mv atomic on same fs. No trap cleanup for .tmp.$$ if awk fails under set -eu.

posix_compliance.rationale: Clean POSIX sh. All quotes in place. No bashisms.

error_handling.rationale: validate-worktree-summary returns exit 1 vs EXIT_VALIDATION=3 convention. regenerate_worktree_summary has no error path.

concerns: regenerate_summary still uses inline awk — incomplete refactor
validate_worktree_summary exit 1 breaks internal exit-code convention (though matches spec)
No trap cleanup of .tmp.$$ files if awk fails mid-rewrite
strengths: replace_md_section cleanly extracted with embedded validation
update_worktree_summary faithful structural parallel of update_summary
